title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Enso launches RWA app and trading for over 500 tokenized assets
summary: Enso launched access to over 500 tokenized assets and US stocks, citing a growing demand for US equity exposure among European investors.

title: Social trading platform Fomo raises $75M, reaches $550M valuation
summary: The Series B round values the social trading and token discovery platform at $550 million as crypto venture funding remains active in 2026.

title: When the Trump administration cracks down on Anthropic, who benefits?
summary: On the new episode of Equity, we discussed what actually prompted the administration's latest moves against Anthropic, and what this might mean for the AI ecosystem.

title: Nobel laureate John Jumper is leaving DeepMind for rival Anthropic
summary: Jumper isn't the only big name leaving Google DeepMind.

title: From PGP to Mythos: a brief history of export controls that didn’t stop anyone
summary: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective. It's unclear why it would work now with Anthropic’s cybersecurity model Mythos.

title: Go eyes robotaxis and acquisitions after Japan’s biggest IPO of 2026 — here’s why it matters
summary: Go's IPO — Japan's biggest so far this year — has done more than provide a much-needed boost to the country's languishing listing season. It has also supplied the taxi-hailing app with the capital required to address an existential issue: Japan's shortage of drivers.

title: India’s Jio lays out sovereign LEO constellation plan ahead of IPO
summary:
Jio Platforms, which owns India’s largest telco, is looking to lease broadband capacity from satellite constellations to jumpstart its own sovereign LEO network in the country.

title: GPT-5.6 Rumors Heat Up as Users Swear ChatGPT Suddenly Got Smarter
summary: Many AI users are convinced that OpenAI is quietly running GPT-5.6 inside ChatGPT. OpenAI isn't confirming anything.

title: Amazon Won't Release Sam Altman Film 'Artificial' Following $50 Billion OpenAI Investment
summary: Amazon is pulling out of "Artificial," a film about Sam Altman's brief ouster from OpenAI, not long after investing $50 billion in the firm.

title: China’s Z.AI Releases GLM-5.2: A Model That Rivals Claude Opus—Using Zero Nvidia Chips
summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 sits within 1% of Claude Opus 4.8 on long-horizon coding benchmarks, runs entirely on Huawei silicon, and undercuts Western frontier models by up to 82% per token.
